overall.description: Game engine footage from a ship simulator showing first-person navigation from the vessel's bridge through stormy coastal waters. The ship moves steadily forward along a rocky coastline with active navigation displays visible overhead, encountering a lightning strike during the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigating stormy coastal waters

agents.ego_description: Navigating the vessel forward through rough seas while monitoring the radar and chart displays

entered.detail: Red-painted foredeck of the vessel with metal railings visible through the bridge windows
Three-screen navigation console showing chart plotter, spinning radar, and depth finder
Jagged rocky cliffs and terrain lining the starboard side of the vessel
Choppy dark water with visible wave motion in the vessel's path

segments.scene_description: The vessel cruises steadily through stormy coastal waters from the enclosed bridge perspective. The red foredeck extends forward toward the horizon while rocky cliffs line the right side. Navigation displays glow overhead showing radar contacts and depth readings as the ship maintains course through the choppy seas.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigating through electrical storm

events.description: Bright lightning bolt strikes visible on the port side, illuminating the storm clouds and ocean surface

agents.ego_description: Maintaining course and speed through the storm while the lightning flashes outside the bridge windows

segments.scene_description: The vessel continues its forward passage as a lightning strike flashes on the left side, briefly illuminating the stormy environment. The rocky coastline recedes into the distance on the right as the ship progresses through the rough seas. The navigation displays remain active overhead, tracking the vessel's movement through the treacherous coastal waters.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward progression from an enclosed bridge through stormy coastal waters as the ship moves away from a rocky shoreline. It begins with the vessel cruising steadily, the red foredeck stretching toward the horizon while glowing navigation displays overhead track radar contacts and depth readings. As the ship maintains its course through the choppy seas, a sudden lightning strike flashes on the left, briefly illuminating the dark, stormy environment. The scene then shifts as the rocky cliffs on the right gradually recede into the distance, leaving the vessel to push further into the rough, open waters under the constant glow of the bridge instruments.
